settings.heading: We got tired of paying for water.
settings.subtext: All My Ducks started with a simple frustration and a stubborn belief that things could be done differently.

settings.heading: Two people. One very annoying shopping aisle.
settings.body:
We were buying the same cleaning products as everyone else — big plastic bottles, mostly water, gone in three weeks. The recycling bin filled up faster than the cabinet.

We started asking why no one had fixed this. The answer turned out to be: someone had to actually do it. So we did.

settings.title: The frustration
settings.body: Two people standing in a supermarket aisle, staring at shelves of plastic bottles that were 90% water. There had to be a better way.

settings.title: First formula
settings.body: Months of kitchen-table testing later — a concentrate that actually worked and felt gentle enough to use every day. The ducks started to align.

settings.title: First customers
settings.body: Small batches. Real feedback. A community of people done with single-use plastic who wanted something that actually meant something.

settings.title: All My Ducks launches
settings.body: The full range goes live. Three products. Zero water shipped. All recycled packaging. The frustration becomes a brand.

settings.heading: Premium doesn't have to mean pretentious.
settings.body:
We think you should be able to buy something genuinely good — good for you, good for the world — without paying luxury prices or wading through greenwashing claims.

Care doesn't have to cost the world. It can heal it. That is the idea behind every product we make.

settings.heading: Small team, real people
settings.body: We read every message. There are no bots, no ticket queues, no offshore support desks. If you have a question or a problem, you are talking to us.

settings.heading: We mean what we say
settings.body: No vague sustainability pledges, no offsetting tricks. We do not ship water. We use recycled plastic. We formulate gently. Full stop.

settings.heading: Built to last
settings.body: We are not here to sell you a new product every month. We want you to have one concentrate that lasts, works well, and sits quietly on your shelf for weeks.

settings.heading: What you can expect from us.
All the ducks. All in a row.
settings.subtext: Try one product. Keep the bottle. Refill it. That is the whole idea.
